metadata.title: Hide Folders
metadata.description: Hides & Toggles configured folders (e.g. attachments folders).

regex.target: name: "切换隐藏文件夹的可见性"
.setName("要隐藏的文件夹")
.setName("忽略大小写")
.setName("隐藏文件夹")
.setName("捐赠")
.log("loading plugin hide-folders")
.setName("将隐藏文件夹加入Obsidian排除列表")
.setName('隐藏底部状态栏的"文件夹已隐藏"指示器')
.setName("[实验性] 兼容性：pjeby的quick-explorer插件")
.setName("GitHub")

regex.source: .setDesc("The names of the folders to hide, one per line. Either exact folder-names, startsWith::FOLDERPREFIX, or endsWith::FOLDERSUFFIX")
regex.target: .setDesc("要隐藏的文件夹名称（每行一个），可以是精确名称、startsWith::文件夹前缀 或 endsWith::文件夹后缀")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, 'SOMEFOLDER', 'someFolder', or 'sOmeFoldEr' will all be treated the same and matched.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用后，'SOMEFOLDER'、'someFolder'和'sOmeFoldEr'将被视为相同并匹配")

regex.source: .setDesc("If the configured folders should be hidden or not")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否隐藏已配置的文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Excluded files will be hidden in Search, Graph View, and Unlinked Mentions, less noticeable in Quick Switcher and link suggestions.")
regex.target: .setDesc("排除文件将在搜索、图谱视图和未链接提及中隐藏，在快速切换器和链接建议中显示较不显眼")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enable there will be no bottom-bar indicator-text telling you if this plugin is active.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用后将不再显示底部状态栏的插件激活提示文本")

regex.source: .setDesc("[WARNING: UNSTABLE] Also hide hidden folders in the https://github.com/pjeby/quick-explorer plugin. Not affiliated with quick-explorer's author.")
regex.target: .setDesc("[警告：不稳定] 同时在 https://github.com/pjeby/quick-explorer 插件中隐藏文件夹。与quick-explorer作者无关联")

regex.source: .setDesc("Report Issues or Ideas, see the Source Code and Contribute.")
regex.target: .setDesc("报告问题或建议，查看源代码并参与贡献")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you like this open-source plugin, consider a small tip to support my unpaid work.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您喜欢这个开源插件，可以考虑打赏支持我的无偿工作")
.setPlaceholder("attachments\nendsWith::_attachments")
.innerText = "实验性与不稳定设置"
